components.name: Nav Menu Item
components.description: Individual pill-shaped navigation item for use inside Navigation Menu. Supports link (plain text) and trigger (text + chevron) types, with default/active/hover states. Compose multiple items via instance swap inside the Navigation Menu parent container.

examples.name: Link States
examples.description: Default, active (current page), and hover states for navigation link items.

examples.name: Trigger States
examples.description: Trigger items include a ChevronDown icon and open a dropdown content panel on hover.

props.name: children
props.description: Label text for the nav item

props.name: asChild (Link)
props.description: Merge props onto child element — use with router Link components

props.name: data-active (Link)
props.description: Marks the link as the current active route

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes — combine with navigationMenuTriggerStyle() for link items

designTokens.description: Default text color for nav items
Active item background + hover text color
Gap between label and chevron icon (ml-1)

bestPractices.do: Use Type=Link for leaf navigation items that go directly to a page. Use Type=Trigger only when the item opens a dropdown content panel.
bestPractices.dont: Use Type=Trigger for items without dropdown content — the ChevronDown icon implies expandable content.

bestPractices.do: Set State=Active on the item matching the current route. Only one item should be Active at a time.
bestPractices.dont: Set multiple items to Active — it confuses users about their current location.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the next item
Activate link or open trigger dropdown
Close open dropdown and return focus to trigger

notes: Trigger items have aria-expanded='true/false' indicating dropdown state.
Link items with data-active get aria-current='page' for screen readers.
Always provide visible text label — avoid icon-only nav items.

related.name: Navigation Menu
related.desc: Parent container that composes multiple Nav Menu Items into a pill tab bar.

related.name: Tabs
related.desc: For in-page section switching — use when content changes without URL navigation.

related.name: Button
related.desc: For actions — don't use Nav Menu Item for non-navigation actions.

components.name: Navigation Menu
components.description: Pill tab bar container for top-level site navigation. Composes Nav Menu Item instances via instance swap — swap items to set label, type (Link/Trigger), and state (Default/Active/Hover). Wraps items in a rounded-full muted container matching the AppHeader pattern.

installation.import:
import {
  NavigationMenu,
  NavigationMenuList,
  NavigationMenuItem,
  NavigationMenuContent,
  NavigationMenuTrigger,
  NavigationMenuLink,
  NavigationMenuViewport,
  navigationMenuTriggerStyle,
} from "@/components/ui/navigation-menu"

examples.name: Pill Nav Bar
examples.description: Standard 4-item pill navigation bar with one active item. Swap any instance to change label, type, or state.

props.name: viewport
props.description: Render a shared NavigationMenuViewport — set false to render dropdown inline below the trigger

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes on the root element

bestPractices.do: Keep 3-5 items in the navigation menu. Use instance swap to set each item's label, type, and state.
bestPractices.dont: Add more than 6 items — horizontal space gets cramped. Move overflow items into a Trigger dropdown.

bestPractices.do: Set exactly one item to State=Active to indicate the current page.
bestPractices.dont: Set multiple items to Active or leave all as Default — users need a clear location indicator.

figmaMapping.codeValue: Set href, data-active, className per item

keyboard.action: Move focus between items within the list
Activate the focused link or open trigger dropdown

notes: Root element renders a <nav> with role='navigation' — acts as a page-level landmark.
Add aria-label to NavigationMenu when multiple navs exist on the same page.
NavigationMenuViewport animates between content panels smoothly — one shared container per menu.

related.name: Nav Menu Item
related.desc: Sub-component — the individual pill items inside this container.

related.name: Tabs
related.desc: For in-page section switching without URL changes.

related.name: Breadcrumb
related.desc: Shows hierarchical location — complement navigation menu with breadcrumbs.
